schema.description:
Serializer for WebhookSubscription model.
Configures endpoints to receive event payloads when matches occur.

target_url.description: URL to POST event data to

signature_algorithm.description:
HMAC algorithm used for X-SoroScan-Signature header.

* `sha256` - SHA-256
* `sha1` - SHA-1 (legacy)

ack_header_name.description: HTTP response header that must be present to acknowledge receipt.

delivery_sla_seconds.description: SLA target in seconds for successful delivery acknowledgements.

escalation_policy.description: Ordered escalation policy list, e.g. [{"channel": "slack", "target": "...", "after_failures": 2}]. Defaults to Slack -> SMS -> PagerDuty when empty.

filter_condition.description: Optional JSON condition DSL used to route events to this webhook.

schema.title: PatchedWebhookSubscription
